data.title: AI interaction protocol Wayfinder launches new badges for PRIME holders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News AI interaction protocol Wayfinder announced the launch of a new badge for PRIME token cachers: Avatar Badge is now activated, the initial snapshot has been completed, and there will be a final snapshot in the future. Holders need to keep the Avatar until the final snapshot to retain the bonus. In addition, a small number of community members who have actively promoted Wayfinder and selflessly contributed their time in the past 8 months have received a unique "Community Builder" badge. This badge will not be issued again, but similar rewards may be launched in the future. The Wayfinder team is working hard to promote the token generation event (TGE).

data.title: Du Jun: Every month, we will publicly select a token to invest $2 million to $10 million and share the basis for our judgment with the community
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News ABCDE co-founder Du Jun posted on the X platform that he will select a token with growth potential from the secondary market every month (excluding Bitcoin), and the single investment amount will be controlled between 2 million and 10 million US dollars.
After each purchase is completed, the corresponding on-chain address and investment logic will be made public to ensure transparency and share their judgment basis with the community.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Trump's tariff plan may force the Fed to restart loose monetary policy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes wrote: "Trump's tariff plan further proves his commitment to reversing these imbalances. For U.S. Treasuries, the problem is that foreign investors cannot buy bonds without dollar exports. The Federal Reserve and the banking system must speed up to ensure the normal operation of the Treasury market, which means restarting loose monetary policy (Brrrr)."

data.title: BNB Drops Below 600 USDT with a Narrowed 0.06% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 03, 2025, 07:42 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 600 USDT and is now trading at 599.940002 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.06% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: FDT's Efforts to Retrieve Funds from Aria Face Challenges
data.description: According to Odaily, FDT has disclosed in Space that their attempts to recover funds from Aria, in collaboration with a legal team, have been hindered. The funds remain frozen due to issues related to Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Know Your Customer (KYC) regulations. FDT attributes the situation to the actions of the technology company itself, and the funds are still held within the Aria fund.

data.title: FDT: We cooperated to withdraw funds, but the funds were frozen due to AML and KYC issues
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: FDT said in Space: We cooperated with the legal team to try to withdraw funds from Aria, but due to AML, KYC and other issues, the funds were frozen, which was directly caused by the technology company itself.

data.title: Ripple Unlocks 500 Million XRP Worth Over $1 Billion
data.description: According to PANews, Ripple has unlocked 500 million XRP from its escrow account, valued at approximately $1.02 billion. This transaction was detected by Whale Alert at 15:04 UTC+8. The release of such a significant amount of XRP could have implications for the cryptocurrency market, as Ripple periodically unlocks XRP to manage its supply and support its operations.

data.title: FDT Responds to Accusations from Justin Sun
data.description: According to Odaily, FDT has addressed accusations made by Justin Sun, questioning why Sun has not pursued these claims in court. FDT stated that in jurisdictions like Hong Kong, they have already undergone this process. They assert that the allegations made by Sun are baseless and that he lacks concrete evidence to substantiate his claims.

data.title: Binance adjusts monitoring labels for 10 currencies including ARDR, and removes seed labels for 3 currencies including JUP
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust some token labels on April 3, 2025: 10 tokens including Ardor (ARDR) and Biswap (BSW) will be added to the monitoring label list, and the seed labels of 3 tokens including Jupiter (JUP) and Starknet (STRK) will be removed. Tokens with monitoring labels have higher volatility and risks, and users need to pass a knowledge test every 90 days before they can trade. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Justin Sun: It is recommended that stablecoin project parties do not choose Hong Kong trust institutions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In response to the question from an Odaily reporter, "How should stablecoin projects ensure the security of their reserves?" Justin Sun said in a live broadcast that it is recommended not to choose a Hong Kong trust institution, but to choose a listed financial institution.
